title: Tiny Totem Pop
description: Makes Your Totem Appear Tiny On The Screen When It Pops! Best Among Other Packs!
body: ## What Is This? This Is a Resource Pack That Contains `Tiny Totem Pop`. This Shrinks The Totem When Popped & It Does Not Cover Half Of Your Screen From The Center. This Can Be Greatly Useful In PvP Or Even General Usage. ## FAQ 1. Why Does The Pack Show "Incompatible Version" & Is Red? - Ans: You Might Be On a Version That Is Not Listed Inside The Pack So It Shows Up As Incompatible Version. You Should Try It First Then If It Works Then Yay, If It Doesn't... Well Then It Doesn't! Also, This Is A Recurring Issue & I Don't Know How To Fix It 😔 Help Would Be Appreciated. ## Socials
